violations.text: Sliced cheese was observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. Date was added to product during time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/13/2026
Refrigerator door gaskets were observed in poor repair on the one door refrigerator on the cooking line. Gaskets must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 06/13/2026
The receptacle in the women's toilet room is lacking a cover. A toilet room used by females shall be provided with a covered receptacle for sanitary napkins. New Violation. Correct By: 05/15/2026
Refrigerator door gaskets were observed in poor repair. Gaskets must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 03/19/2026
